chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible for the Muhrim to Do and Use of All Types

text: 2652 - وَ سَأَلَ ذَرِيحٌ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلْمُحْرِمِ يَحْتَجِمُ فَقَالَ «نَعَمْ إِذَا خَشِيَ اَلدَّمَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2652 - Dharih asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a Muhrim undergoing cupping (hijamah).
Imam (as) said: "Yes, if he fears harm from the blood."
